name: False Alarm Recovery — Clifton Explosion Rumour
description: A social media panic erupts claiming a gas explosion in Clifton Block 9. High initial social signal volume triggers agent alert. However, field unit investigation and a verified KE (K-Electric) report contradict the claim — revealing it was a burst water main, not an explosion. System retracts the alert and issues a correction.

initial_signals.content: HUGE BLAST in Clifton Block 9 near Boat Basin!! Gas cylinder explosion. Black smoke visible from far. Run! #KarachiBlast #Clifton
Clifton mein dhamaka hua hai, logon ko ghar se nikaalna shuru kar diya. Bahut zyada dhuaan aa raha hai bhai!
Unverified: Reports of explosion near Boat Basin. No official confirmation yet. Please avoid area and stay calm.

On-ground investigation complete. NO explosion. NO gas leak. What happened: A high-pressure KWSB water main burst loudly — created steam cloud and loud bang. Area is SAFE. All social media reports are FALSE. Crowd dispersing.
SSGC confirms: All gas pipelines in Clifton Block 8-9 are INTACT. No gas leak or explosion detected. Source of panic: Burst KWSB pipeline under road. RETRACT all alerts.

conflicting_signals.actual_event: Burst KWSB water main under road — loud bang + steam cloud misinterpreted as explosion
conflicting_signals.retraction_message: ALERT RETRACTED: No explosion in Clifton. Cause confirmed as a burst water pipeline (KWSB). Area declared safe. KWSB repair crew dispatched. Normal traffic to resume within 2 hours.
